posts.author: Catarina (Catarina Almeida)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Anyone to help me understanding why the Mrg% Value in the Group is different from my excel calculation? The Mg% Value for each item is correct, but the totals are not. If I have a total of Revenue and a total of Costs, How can I have the Mg% correctly from a group in Minday Board?

Thank you
CA
